text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No luck... No matter how much I try!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This full-course Overlord cuisine is<n>designed to
channel my beauty to all<n>five senses.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Appearance! Aroma! Texture! Every<n>ingredient
uniting in harmony with<n>each bite!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Each piece is perfectly linked... Yet<n>after all these
attempts, the most vital<n>element, my beauty,
remains absent<n>from the flavor...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Must I suffer to taste this<n>vacuous meal
once again?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Spe, what's that yearning in your<n>eye?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
N-nothing! I just... smelled something<n>really
yummy and heard the word<n>"taste," so...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Truly?! You wish to sample the<n>flavor?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But to impart to you a beauty that is<n>yet
incomplete... As the Overlord, I<n>could not possibly—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Opera O! We're friends, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let me help you! For the sake of your<n>yum—um,
perfectly beautiful cuisine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Spe! You kind soul! I entrust the<n>star's role to
you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O doesn't sample even a<n>bite of her
food and slims down as a<n>result.
